gaps: Official cloud CLIs expose endpoint operations but rarely combine local archive, search, analytics, and agent-friendly diagnostics in one generated tool.
patterns: DigitalOcean users need fast read-only inventory and troubleshooting workflows across account resources.

novel_features.name: Local resource archive
novel_features.description: Sync DigitalOcean resources into a local SQLite store for offline inspection and repeatable agent workflows.
novel_features.rationale: Cloud inventory questions often need cross-resource context without repeatedly calling the live API.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Gives agents a durable local inventory before planning cloud changes.

novel_features.name: Full-text cloud search
novel_features.description: Search synced DigitalOcean data locally, with live/local source selection for agent-friendly retrieval.
novel_features.rationale: Finding resources by fuzzy text is faster than remembering exact endpoint and filter combinations.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Lets agents locate relevant resources before choosing a narrower command.

novel_features.name: Archive analytics
novel_features.description: Summarize locally synced resource data with count and group-by operations.
novel_features.rationale: Operators often need shape-of-account answers, not raw endpoint dumps.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Turns resource listings into operational summaries an agent can reason about.

novel_features.name: Polling tail
novel_features.description: Poll selected resources and emit change events as NDJSON for shell and agent pipelines.
novel_features.rationale: Many cloud APIs lack a single streaming surface for account resource changes.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Provides a safe one-shot or continuous change feed without bespoke scripts.
